query:
SELECT EXISTS(
               SELECT 1
               FROM source_persons sp
               JOIN sources s ON s.id = sp.source_id
               WHERE sp.person_id = $1
                 AND (
                     s.created_by <> $2
                     OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM resources r
                               WHERE r.source_id = s.id AND r.archived_at IS NULL)
                 )
           ) AS "used!"
